ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-09-2020 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-26-2020 Continued To Apr-28-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Alisa Kim, Esq. appearing specially for Plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to Apr-28-2020 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-08-2020 Continued To Feb-25-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to Feb-25-2020 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Court orders notice of Impending Discretionary Dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b). Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)
